Moin moin 

desktop@ would like to ask for an exp-run to upgrade graphics/poppler to 22.01.

The patch is attached, and can also be found here:

https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/0001-graphics-poppler-update-to-22.01.patch


mfg Toibas
